calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,220p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272488 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73272488 --event evt-petition-disposition && find data/cases/scotus/73272488 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/snapshots/2026-07-10.json data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/documents.json data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/questions-presented.txt data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/context.json && sed -n '1,220p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,1150p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1151,2300p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '2301,3262p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/documents/petition.txt && sed -n '1,80p' data/cases/scotus/73272488/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n -A55 -B5 \"Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition|originating circuit|Third Circuit|2025 Term|2024 Term\" metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"^## |^### \" metrics/statpack.md && sed -n '1,240p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '230,420p' metrics/statpack.md && rg -n \"discretionary|cert petitions|by disposition|era\" metrics -g '*.md' -g '*.json'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":22000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq 'keys, .scotus | keys' metrics/statpack.json && jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"modern_discretionary_cert\"))' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.[0], map(.name // .metric // .section // .title)' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":16000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"head -60 metrics/statpack.json && tail -40 metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.sections | map({label, key, name, title, buckets_count: (.buckets|length)})' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":16000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --disposition granted --era 2020s --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
const matches = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|citation|search/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(matches);

const tool = ALL_TOOLS.find(x => x.name === "mcp__courtlistener__search"); if (!tool) throw new Error("missing CourtListener search"); const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"general Rule 29 motion\" sufficiency preservation de novo plain error",filed_before:"2026-07-10",fields:["id","caseName","dateFiled","court_citation_string","citation","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10,order_by:"score desc"}); for (const c of (r.content ??
